policies.holidays: We are closed on major federal holidays including Veterans Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas, and New Year's Day
policies.sick_child: Children with fever above 100.4°F must stay home for 24 hours after fever breaks without medication
policies.lunch: We provide lunch daily for $8/day, ordered by 9 AM
policies.tours: Schedule tours Monday-Friday 9 AM-11 AM by calling us or through our website
policies.late_pickup: Late pickup fee of $15 per 15 minutes after 6 PM
